evidence.claim: The system allows adding comments on posts.
evidence.fact: Users can build personal profiles, post updates, and engage with friends and groups through likes and comments.

evidence.claim: The user has a comment on a post.
evidence.user_story_span: I have a comment on a post

evidence.claim: When the interaction occurs, I submit the comment.
When the interaction occurs, I write a comment.
The system allows managing my own comments (edit/delete).
evidence.fact: Users can delete their own posts.
